stemHtml: Following a radio communications failure for an IFR flight in VMC…

options.a: If the weather permits, set transponder code 7601 and land at the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.b: Maintain the last assigned speed and level for a period of 10 minutes following a radio communication failure before taking further action.
options.c: Maintain VMC and continue to the destination aerodrome.
options.d: If the weather permits, set transponder code 7500 and land at the nearest en-route alternate aerodrome.
